title: Bucesvara Temple, Koravangala
tagline: Bucesvara Temple, Koravangala — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: Bucesvara temple, also referred to as the Buceswara, Bucheshwara or Bhucheshvara temple, is a 12th-century Hindu temples in Koravangala village, Karnataka, India.
overview.description: Bucesvara temple, also referred to as the Buceswara, Bucheshwara or Bhucheshvara temple, is a 12th-century Hindu temples in Koravangala village, Karnataka, India. The most sophisticated historical temple in the village, it is considered to be the flag-bearer of Hoysala architecture and was built by a wealthy patron named Buchi during the reign of king Ballala. It is a twin temple with the two sanctums facing each other. The sanctum next to the larger mandapa opens to the east and is dedicated to Shiva, while the other near the two entrances is dedicated to Surya.

topPlaces.name: Sathyamangala
topPlaces.description: Satyamangala is a census town located at Hassan taluk in Hassan district in the Indian state of Karnataka. It is near ka -state highway 71 (hassan-arsikere Highway).

topPlaces.name: Master Control Facility
topPlaces.description: The Master Control Facility (MCF) is a facility set up by ISRO in the city of Hassan in the Indian state of Karnataka. Established in 1982, this facility is responsible for monitoring and controlling geostationary and geosynchronous satellites launched by ISRO. This was the only Master Control Facility of ISRO till another one was established in Bhopal in 2005.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Bucesvara Temple, Koravangala?
faq.a: The best time to visit Bucesvara Temple, Koravangala is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Bucesvara Temple, Koravangala?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mysuru Airport (105 km) and the nearest railway station is Mysuru Junction (97 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Bucesvara Temple, Koravangala?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Bucesvara Temple, Koravangala at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Bucesvara Temple, Koravangala?
faq.a: Stays in Bucesvara Temple, Koravangala start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Bucesvara Temple, Koravangala?
faq.a: The top attractions are Dudda, Hassan, Sathyamangala, Master Control Facility, Haravanahalli, Hassan, Karnataka.
